key_findings: All 3 models pass exactly 1/10 tasks in standard mode (D-E1 carousel - static enough for single screenshot)
AOI audio perception enables podcast (A-E1) comprehension across all 3 models (0/3 → 3/3)
AOI audio perception enables phone/voicemail (G-E1) comprehension for 2/3 models
Standard mode achieves 0/15 on audio tasks (0%); AOI achieves 5/15 (33%)
Visual temporal tasks (C, F, J) remain difficult even with AOI - action format and timing issues
H-E1 (interview/speak) blocked by asyncio event loop conflict in TTS engine - fixable
B-E1 (meeting) audio captured but model types wrong date - timing/comprehension issue
I-E1 (collab dictation) audio captured but action execution doesn't properly type into editor
bugs_identified: speak action: asyncio event loop conflict - TTSEngine.synthesize() conflicts with Playwright
D-E1 regression in Claude AOI: audio injection overhead may interfere with carousel timing
Keyframe extraction: toast notifications and game moles produce near-zero CLIP distance (below theta)
improvements_needed: Fix TTSEngine asyncio conflict for speak action (H-E1 and other interactive tasks)
Improve action prompt to produce executable commands rather than NL descriptions
Lower CLIP theta or add pixel-only capture mode for small UI elements (toasts)
Better audio timing - inject audio earlier so agent hears full content before acting
Run with more steps (15-20) to give agent more attempts
